description.value: You are an aquatic elf who spends most of your life underwater. You have the ability to breathe both air and water, but you cannot live indefinitely on the surface. You gain the amphibious trait, and you have a swim Speed of 30 feet. At least once a week, you must take an 8-hour period of rest underwater. If you do not, you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Fatigued], and you cannot recover from this fatigue until you rest underwater.
